## What

<!-- one-line summary — becomes the squash commit subject (Conventional Commit) -->

## Why

<!-- context / linked issue -->

## Definition of Done (see CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] Tests (unit; integration if repos/Valkey touched)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing (`/docs`) · ADR if a design decision was touched
- [ ] Telemetry: new failure mode ⇒ metric/log
- [ ] Audit events for mutations
- [ ] Isolation impact considered (new tenant table ⇒ RLS template + isolation test)
- [ ] Error codes added to the catalog
- [ ] OpenAPI diff attached if the public API changed
